name: secgate
description: SecGate — Zero-Trust Guardrail for Infra Agents

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w infra-mcp && npm run build -w guardian && npm run build -w @secgate/pomerium && npm run build -w @secgate/nexla
scripts.test: npm run test -w infra-mcp && npm run test -w guardian && npm run test -w @secgate/pomerium && npm run test -w @secgate/nexla
scripts.test:phase1: npm run test:phase1 -w infra-mcp && npm run test -w guardian
scripts.test:phase5: npm run build && npx tsx --test guardian/test/orphan.test.ts && node demo/test-phase5.js
scripts.test:timeline: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w infra-mcp && node --test demo/test-timeline.js
